MELItem.Title: Storage Bins/Cabin, Galley and Lavatory Storage Compartments/Closets

ListItem.Para: Procedures are established to secure the affected bin, compartment or closet in the closed position.
Affected bin, compartment or closet is prominently placarded DO NOT USE.
Any emergency equipment located in affected bin, compartment or closet is considered inoperative.
Affected bin, compartment or closet is not used for storage of any items except for those permanently affixed.

Note.Para: For overhead bins, if no partitions are installed, the entire overhead bin is considered inoperative.
Proviso is not intended to preclude crewmember inspections.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: secure inoperative bins, compartments or closets closed (AMM DDG 25-28-01).

DispatchCondition.Title: Door Removed or Retractable Door Secured Open

ListItem.Para: For non-retractable doors, affected door is removed.
For retractable doors, affected door is removed or secured in the retracted (fully open) position.
Affected bin, compartment or closet is not used for storage of any items, except those permanently affixed.
Affected bin, compartment or closet is prominently placarded DO NOT USE.
Procedures are established and used to alert crew members and passengers of inoperative bins, compartments or closets.
Passengers are briefed that affected bin, compartment or closet is not to be used.

Note.Para: For overhead bins, if no partitions are installed, the entire overhead bin is considered inoperative.
Any emergency equipment located in the affected bin, compartment or closet (permanently affixed) is available for use.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Remove door from associated bin, compartment or closet (AMM DDG 25-28-01).

OperationProcedure.Para: Ensure crew members and passengers are briefed that associated bin, compartment or closet is not to be used.

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: One latch/lug per compartment may be inoperative provided:

ListItem.Para: Remaining latch(es)/lug(s) on affected compartments operate normally.
If affected compartment is used for a galley cart, the cart remains empty.

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative in the unlocked position provided doors can be secured by other means.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Ensure that door with inoperative lock can be secured by other means (AMM DDG 25-28-01).
